/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/TraductorDefinitivo.dir/src/AVLTree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TraductorDefinitivo.dir/src/AuthService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TraductorDefinitivo.dir/src/CipherPhase2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TraductorDefinitivo.dir/src/HistoryService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TraductorDefinitivo.dir/src/TranslationService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TraductorDefinitivo.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o TraductorDefinitivo  /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd
